allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'fix: repair sGTM container JSON so GTM import succeeds' --body ' *)
Bash(git -c http.lowSpeedLimit=0 -c http.lowSpeedTime=120 push origin fix/sgtm-container-import)
Bash(git -c credential.helper= -c http.lowSpeedLimit=0 -c http.lowSpeedTime=120 push origin fix/sgtm-container-import)

PowerShell($py = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not $py\) { $py = Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if \(-not $py\) { $py = Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if \($py\) { Write-Output "PYTHON=$\($py.Source\)"; & $py.Source --version } else { Write-Output "PYTHON_NOT_FOUND" })

Bash(cd "/c/Users/Yousef/Downloads/easytrac.io-main/easytrac.io-main" && echo "CR byte count \(current\):" && tr -cd '\\r' < server.js | wc -c && echo "CR byte count \(backup\):" && tr -cd '\\r' < /tmp/server.js.bak | wc -c && echo "=== changed-hunk summary \(strip CR\) ===" && diff --strip-trailing-cr /tmp/server.js.bak server.js | grep -E '^[0-9]' )

PowerShell($n = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($n\) { Write-Output "node FOUND: $\($n.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "node NOT on PATH" }; $paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "exists: $p" } })
